title: Sunday Millet Stir Fry
description: A simple and nutritious millet stir fry perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon. This recipe combines the nutty flavor of millet with crunchy vegetables for a delicious and filling meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the carrots and broccoli and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
Add the millet and stir-fry for another 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
